news.paragraph: Oracle is seeing positive momentum following an Oppenheimer price target increase to $235 and expectations of fiscal Q4 upside driven by tech infrastructure spending. The company also announced that Samsung Electronics has adopted Oracle Java for its software development projects. Traders should monitor upcoming fiscal Q4 earnings as a key catalyst for potential volatility.
headlines: Oracle Could See Fiscal Q4 Upside From Restructuring, Strong Tech Infrastructure Spending, Oppenheimer Says
Oracle Names Tomislav Mihaljevic, M.D., to the Board of Directors
Oracle Says Samsung Electronics Adopts Oracle Java for Software Development Projects
Oppenheimer Adjusts Price Target on Oracle to $235 From $210, Maintains Outperform Rating
Is Oracle (ORCL) One of the Best Robinhood Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires?
Oracle Set to Post Strong Results Amid Tech Infrastructure Spending, Oppenheimer Says
